---
title: "CQFT3 Notes"
bibliography: references.bib
---

I will compile my notes for the course
Introduction to Constructive Quantum Field Theory 
Part 3 on this page.

### Link to Scanned Handwritten Notes

- [Lecture 1 Scan. April 15.](https://drive.google.com/drive/u/0/folders/1pIWspBZtL7bRy5OIYvteUJMcYOkP-NoG).
